notes: Even though the previous reports say that game works, it often crashes. Also I didn't have any sound issues, like other posters. What the previous reports might have missed, that none of the cinematics aren't playing (if you start a new game, there should be one playing, which it isn't)
title: Seven: The Days Long Gone

notes: Works out of the box without any workaround, even in 4k with DXVK! No issues with Audio since FAudio has been added to Proton.

notes: Works fine without tweaks. Played first mission and got to first city on island.

notes: The game launches, but can't start a new game. Can't get past the intro. The intro starts to play with only subtitles and audio, skip doesn't work, game crashes after that.
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes: The game launches but will not show the video for the intro and eventually hangs using Proton. The game needs Windows Media Foundation. It works using the Lutris installer https://lutris.net/games/seven-the-days-long-gone/ using Lutris to launch the game I've played about 5 hours  without any issues.
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes: Game launches to menu but I can't start a new game. The intro video does not end/can't be skipped. Tried the DmC 5 / Res.Evil 2 fix with the mediafoundation files but had no luck with it.
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes: Menu works, but can't start the game. Intro video only has audio and can't be skipped. When it ends, the game just hangs and never starts.
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes: Requires manually install MFplat.dll  like RE:2 ; put MFplat.dll to $your-prefix/drive_c/windows/system32 and override mfplat " native,builtin" via winecfg ,game runs very well.
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes: Tried the mfplat.dll fix with no luck. Game does not get past intro
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes: Demo version works out of the box - platinium
title: Seven: Enhanced Edition

notes:
(1) Some sound issues fixed by installing xact via winetricks

(2) Installed media foundation using z0z0z/mf-installcab script

(3) Copy mfplat.dll to "/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Seven The Days Long Gone/Seven/Binaries/Win64" notice that this is not the game directory but GAMEDIR/Seven/Binaries/Win64/
